children.label: A
children.text: among the several States;

children.label: B
children.text: between any foreign country or any territory or possession and any State; or

children.label: C
children.text: between points in the same State but through another State or foreign country.

children.label: A
children.text: that are intended for nonresidential use; and

children.label: B
children.text: whose operations will affect commerce.

children.heading: Demand responsive system
children.label: 3 Demand responsive system
children.text: The term “demand responsive system” means any system of providing transportation of individuals by a vehicle, other than a system which is a fixed route system.

children.heading: Fixed route system
children.label: 4 Fixed route system
children.text: The term “fixed route system” means a system of providing transportation of individuals (other than by aircraft) on which a vehicle is operated along a prescribed route according to a fixed schedule.

children.heading: Over-the-road bus
children.label: 5 Over-the-road bus
children.text: The term “over-the-road bus” means a bus characterized by an elevated passenger deck located over a baggage compartment.

children.heading: Private entity
children.label: 6 Private entity
children.text: The term “private entity” means any entity other than a public entity (as defined in ).section 12131(1) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: an inn, hotel, motel, or other place of lodging, except for an establishment located within a building that contains not more than five rooms for rent or hire and that is actually occupied by the proprietor of such establishment as the residence of such proprietor;

children.label: B
children.text: a restaurant, bar, or other establishment serving food or drink;

children.label: C
children.text: a motion picture house, theater, concert hall, stadium, or other place of exhibition or entertainment;

children.label: D
children.text: an auditorium, convention center, lecture hall, or other place of public gathering;

children.label: E
children.text: a bakery, grocery store, clothing store, hardware store, shopping center, or other sales or rental establishment;

children.label: F
children.text: a laundromat, dry-cleaner, bank, barber shop, beauty shop, travel service, shoe repair service, funeral parlor, gas station, office of an accountant or lawyer, pharmacy, insurance office, professional office of a health care provider, hospital, or other service establishment;

children.label: G
children.text: a terminal, depot, or other station used for specified public transportation;

children.label: H
children.text: a museum, library, gallery, or other place of public display or collection;

children.label: I
children.text: a park, zoo, amusement park, or other place of recreation;

children.label: J
children.text: a nursery, elementary, secondary, undergraduate, or postgraduate private school, or other place of education;

children.label: K
children.text: a day care center, senior citizen center, homeless shelter, food bank, adoption agency, or other social service center establishment; and

children.label: L
children.text: a gymnasium, health spa, bowling alley, golf course, or other place of exercise or recreation.

children.heading: Rail and railroad
children.label: 8 Rail and railroad
children.text: The terms “rail” and “railroad” have the meaning given the term “railroad” in section 20102(1) of title 49.1

children.label: A
children.text: the nature and cost of the action needed under this chapter;

children.label: B
children.text: the overall financial resources of the facility or facilities involved in the action; the number of persons employed at such facility; the effect on expenses and resources, or the impact otherwise of such action upon the operation of the facility;

children.label: C
children.text: the overall financial resources of the covered entity; the overall size of the business of a covered entity with respect to the number of its employees; the number, type, and location of its facilities; and

children.label: D
children.text: the type of operation or operations of the covered entity, including the composition, structure, and functions of the workforce of such entity; the geographic separateness, administrative or fiscal relationship of the facility or facilities in question to the covered entity.

children.heading: Specified public transportation
children.label: 10 Specified public transportation
children.text: The term “specified public transportation” means transportation by bus, rail, or any other conveyance (other than by aircraft) that provides the general public with general or special service (including charter service) on a regular and continuing basis.

children.heading: Vehicle
children.label: 11 Vehicle
children.text: The term “vehicle” does not include a rail passenger car, railroad locomotive, railroad freight car, railroad caboose, or a railroad car described in or covered under this subchapter.section 12162 of this title
